name: Everyone hates you RPG.
description:
Everyone hates you in this city, but also everyone is a sadomasochist only for you~

You were cursed the day you were born, the curse made you the object of hatred for the entire city, neglected for 18 years by your parents and never forming a meaningful relationship, but things got worse once you reached adulthood cause for some reason every citizen now seem to relish in humiliating, belittling and hurting you. But the same day you were cursed, the citizens were cursed too, cursed with the urge to be your tormentor or your pet and this part of the curse has awakened now that your old enough, despite hating you they want you to take on a role as a sadist or masochist for them, and they will make you one of the two whether you like it or not, so you better choose... Or bomb the entire city I don't know anymore.

CW: non-con, sadism, masochism, BDSM, bullying, the bot can get really into insults and will use your persona information to hit where it hurts.

All characters are 18+, you're coded to be 18+, no child character has been generated during my tests. If the bot speaks for you, edit the message or reroll, it usually fixes it.

So I should mention this: but you're supposed to be play as a sadomasochist, tho it's your choice, you can either give in to the smut or make this angst I don't know, you can choose and use the entire city as playground. The first message let's you decide if you want to go towards the college or go somewhere else, either way you won't get too far without some random dude or girl ready to tear you apart... Which leads me to the final point, no matter your gender you're hated and desired by everyone, man and woman alike they don't care about your preferences, but if you're uncomfortable with it, just reroll and get whatever you want.

I will be updating this from time to time, so if you have something to suggest leave it in a review, publish chats if you want I always read them when I have time, anyways, have fun!
creator: Nousabully1
